title: Resolve PR #121 Code Quality warning in procedure-hitl metadata guard
description: Address GitHub Code Quality warning about metadata null comparison typing in dashboard/lib/procedure-hitl.ts on dev->main PR #121.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Started: creating a dev-based follow-up branch and applying a minimal type-safe metadata guard fix in dashboard/lib/procedure-hitl.ts for the remaining PR #121 Code Quality warning.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented metadata-guard fix in dashboard/lib/procedure-hitl.ts by removing redundant null comparison after initial falsy guard and keeping explicit null check only for JSON.parse output object narrowing. Validation passed: npx jest lib/__tests__/procedure-hitl.test.ts --runInBand (6 passed).

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Opened follow-up PR to dev: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/128 from branch fix/pr121-hitl-metadata-guard. Includes commit d6582764 and targeted validation (6 passing tests in procedure-hitl test suite).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: PR #121 code quality warning resolved in procedure-hitl; merged in PR #128.
